CMS · QUOTE VERIFICATION & REINSTATEMENT
03
Quotes
Where a quote is required as part of the claims process, CMS sources pricing from a network of vetted and approved service providers to establish a market-related benchmark. All service providers engaged by CMS are pre-qualified so that their pricing and workmanship standards align with industry norms.
Each quote obtained is rigorously reviewed against the scope of work defined by the appointed loss adjuster — ensuring every line item is directly relevant to the assessed damage or loss, with no costs falling outside the approved claim scope.
Where the client has independently sourced their own quote, CMS conducts a thorough verification assessment to confirm:
The pricing submitted is market-related and consistent with current industry rates; and
The scope of work in the client's quote aligns with the claim as submitted and assessed.
04
Reinstatement
End-to-end reinstatement — managed in-house from incident to completion.
